tasks.prompt: You are given a SQLite database at {db_path}. The raw_orders table contains order rows. Create a table named customer_revenue with columns customer_id TEXT and total_revenue REAL. Include only rows where status = 'paid'. total_revenue must be the rounded sum of quantity * unit_price per customer, ordered by customer_id when queried. Also create an index named idx_customer_revenue_customer_id on customer_revenue(customer_id).
